deviations.what: the original binds src/mode/height/width to a JSONModel (img>/products, /imageMode, /imageHeight, /imageWidth); the fixed sample values are inlined here as literals (mode Background, the HT-7777 / HT-6100 demo images).
image height/width are device dependent in the original (5em on a phone) - fixed to 10em here.
the custom CSS class imageContainer (light blue background) of the box4 HBox is dropped - its stylesheet is not available in abap2UI5.
